english_text: I'm the queen of this place
I married into a chaebol family
This marriage is a business deal
You can't buy love with money
A queen never cries in public
I'll show you who I am
Behind every smile is a scar
My tears are not for you
Nothing is free in this world
I loved you in my own way
Pain made me who I am

romanization: sarangeun jeonjaengiyaSome tears are worth shedding
